description:
Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md §1 (premise), §10 (open questions resolved), removal tally throughout.

Removal-only commit family:
- frame_ptr ABI param (src/ir_codegen.rs signature building).
- Frame slot 0 (cont_ptr) load/store in every Call lowering.
- Trampoline loop CompiledModule::run_quantum (src/ir_codegen.rs:195-260).
- Per-fn frame schema for non-parking fns; Process::frame_sizes; fz_alloc_frame for non-parking paths.
- Native-vs-uniform branching in emit_call / emit_tail_call.
- Slot-0 force-Tagged pass (fz-ul4.27.14.1, src/ir_codegen.rs:1580+).
- Native-chain Tagged seam (fz-ul4.27.14.2, src/ir_codegen.rs:2974-2982).
- Closure stub_fp indirection (fz-ul4.29.5).
- cont_blocked set in src/parking.rs.
- fz-ul4.27.16 (no-frame_ptr-in-native-fn invariant) — vacuous after removal.
- fz-ul4.27.20 (make main native) — subsumed.

Acceptance: all four §8 fixtures pass; full existing test suite passes; grep for removed names returns empty.
title: fz-cps.5: delete uniform-path machinery
